svg.title: New API technical architecture
svg.desc: New API routes requests from web consoles, SDKs, and AI applications through a unified interface, Go backend, relay pipeline, and model adapters to many AI service providers. Database, Redis, Docker, and Docker Compose support the platform.
svg.text: A unified gateway from any client to every AI provider
Portable, self-hosted, and ready to scale
One deployment · Multi-tenant management · Unified billing · Secure access control
